mapper.select: SELECT r.id AS "registerId", r.patient_id AS "patientId", r.case_number AS "caseNumber", r.real_name AS "realName", r.gender AS "gender", r.age AS "age", r.visit_date AS "visitDate", r.visit_state AS "visitState", r.clinical_archived_at AS "clinicalArchivedAt", r.clinical_archived_by AS "clinicalArchivedBy", d.dept_name AS "departmentName", e.realname AS "physicianName" FROM register r LEFT JOIN department d ON d.id = r.deptment_id LEFT JOIN employee e ON e.id = r.employee_id WHERE r.id = #{registerId}

SELECT r.id AS "registerId", r.case_number AS "caseNumber", r.visit_date AS "visitDate", r.visit_state AS "visitState", r.clinical_archived_at AS "clinicalArchivedAt", d.dept_name AS "departmentName", e.realname AS "physicianName", mr.diagnosis AS "diagnosis", mr.preliminary_diagnosis AS "preliminaryDiagnosis" FROM register r LEFT JOIN department d ON d.id = r.deptment_id LEFT JOIN employee e ON e.id = r.employee_id LEFT JOIN medical_record mr ON mr.register_id = r.id WHERE r.patient_id = #{patientId} AND r.visit_state != 4 ORDER BY r.visit_date DESC NULLS LAST, r.id DESC

SELECT id AS "id", register_id AS "registerId", chief_complaint AS "chiefComplaint", symptom_duration AS "symptomDuration", history_summary AS "historySummary", allergy_summary AS "allergySummary", medication_summary AS "medicationSummary", ai_summary AS "aiSummary", suggested_exam AS "suggestedExam", completion_time AS "completionTime", creation_time AS "creationTime" FROM ai_consultation_record WHERE register_id = #{registerId} AND consultation_state = 'completed' ORDER BY completion_time DESC NULLS LAST, creation_time DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT id AS "id", symptom_description AS "symptomDescription", recommend_dept_name AS "recommendDeptName", recommend_doctor_name AS "recommendDoctorName", risk_level AS "riskLevel", ai_analysis AS "aiAnalysis", triage_time AS "triageTime" FROM ai_triage_record WHERE register_id = #{registerId} ORDER BY triage_time DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT id AS "id", register_id AS "registerId", readme AS "readme", present AS "present", present_treat AS "presentTreat", history AS "history", allergy AS "allergy", physique AS "physique", proposal AS "proposal", preliminary_diagnosis AS "preliminaryDiagnosis", careful AS "careful", diagnosis AS "diagnosis", cure AS "cure" FROM medical_record WHERE register_id = #{registerId}

SELECT d.id AS "id", d.disease_code AS "diseaseCode", d.disease_name AS "diseaseName", d.diseaseicd AS "diseaseIcd" FROM medical_record_disease mrd INNER JOIN disease d ON d.id = mrd.disease_id WHERE mrd.medical_record_id = #{medicalRecordId} ORDER BY d.disease_name

SELECT cr.id AS "id", mt.tech_name AS "techName", cr.check_info AS "checkInfo", cr.check_position AS "checkPosition", cr.check_remark AS "checkRemark", cr.check_result AS "checkResult", cr.check_state AS "checkState", cr.check_time AS "checkTime", cr.creation_time AS "creationTime" FROM check_request cr INNER JOIN medical_technology mt ON mt.id = cr.medical_technology_id WHERE cr.register_id = #{registerId} ORDER BY cr.creation_time ASC, cr.id ASC

SELECT ir.id AS "id", mt.tech_name AS "techName", ir.inspection_info AS "inspectionInfo", ir.inspection_position AS "inspectionPosition", ir.inspection_remark AS "inspectionRemark", ir.inspection_result AS "inspectionResult", ir.inspection_state AS "inspectionState", ir.inspection_time AS "inspectionTime", ir.creation_time AS "creationTime" FROM inspection_request ir INNER JOIN medical_technology mt ON mt.id = ir.medical_technology_id WHERE ir.register_id = #{registerId} ORDER BY ir.creation_time ASC, ir.id ASC

SELECT dr.id AS "id", mt.tech_name AS "techName", dr.disposal_info AS "disposalInfo", dr.disposal_position AS "disposalPosition", dr.disposal_remark AS "disposalRemark", dr.disposal_result AS "disposalResult", dr.disposal_state AS "disposalState", dr.disposal_time AS "disposalTime", dr.creation_time AS "creationTime" FROM disposal_request dr INNER JOIN medical_technology mt ON mt.id = dr.medical_technology_id WHERE dr.register_id = #{registerId} ORDER BY dr.creation_time ASC, dr.id ASC

SELECT p.id AS "id", d.drug_name AS "drugName", d.drug_format AS "drugFormat", d.drug_unit AS "drugUnit", p.drug_usage AS "drugUsage", p.drug_number AS "drugNumber", p.drug_state AS "drugState", p.creation_time AS "creationTime" FROM prescription p INNER JOIN drug_info d ON d.id = p.drug_id WHERE p.register_id = #{registerId} ORDER BY p.creation_time ASC, p.id ASC

SELECT cr.id AS "id", mt.tech_name AS "techName", cr.check_position AS "checkPosition", cr.check_result AS "checkResult", cr.check_state AS "checkState", cr.check_time AS "checkTime", cr.check_remark AS "checkRemark", a.risk_level AS "riskLevel", a.analysis_report AS "analysisReport", a.abnormal_indicators AS "abnormalIndicators", a.correlation_analysis AS "correlationAnalysis" FROM check_request cr INNER JOIN medical_technology mt ON mt.id = cr.medical_technology_id LEFT JOIN ai_exam_analysis a ON a.check_request_id = cr.id WHERE cr.register_id = #{registerId} ORDER BY cr.creation_time DESC, cr.id DESC

SELECT ir.id AS "id", mt.tech_name AS "techName", ir.inspection_position AS "inspectionPosition", ir.inspection_result AS "inspectionResult", ir.inspection_state AS "inspectionState", ir.inspection_time AS "inspectionTime", ir.inspection_remark AS "inspectionRemark", a.risk_level AS "riskLevel", a.analysis_report AS "analysisReport", a.abnormal_indicators AS "abnormalIndicators", a.correlation_analysis AS "correlationAnalysis" FROM inspection_request ir INNER JOIN medical_technology mt ON mt.id = ir.medical_technology_id LEFT JOIN ai_exam_analysis a ON a.inspection_request_id = ir.id WHERE ir.register_id = #{registerId} ORDER BY ir.creation_time DESC, ir.id DESC

SELECT id AS "id", analysis_type AS "analysisType", original_result AS "originalResult", abnormal_indicators AS "abnormalIndicators", risk_level AS "riskLevel", analysis_report AS "analysisReport", correlation_analysis AS "correlationAnalysis" FROM ai_exam_analysis WHERE register_id = #{registerId} ORDER BY analysis_time DESC, id DESC

SELECT patient_id AS "patientId", allergy_summary AS "allergySummary", chronic_conditions AS "chronicConditions", past_diagnosis_summary AS "pastDiagnosisSummary", last_visit_at AS "lastVisitAt", updated_at AS "updatedAt" FROM patient_clinical_profile WHERE patient_id = #{patientId}
SELECT id AS "patientId", real_name AS "realName", allergy_history AS "allergyHistory" FROM patient WHERE id = #{patientId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO patient_clinical_profile ( patient_id, allergy_summary, chronic_conditions, past_diagnosis_summary, last_visit_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{patientId}, #{allergySummary}, #{chronicConditions}, #{pastDiagnosisSummary}, #{lastVisitAt}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ) ON CONFLICT (patient_id) DO UPDATE SET allergy_summary = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.allergy_summary, patient_clinical_profile.allergy_summary), chronic_conditions = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.chronic_conditions, patient_clinical_profile.chronic_conditions), past_diagnosis_summary = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.past_diagnosis_summary, patient_clinical_profile.past_diagnosis_summary), last_visit_at = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.last_visit_at, patient_clinical_profile.last_visit_at), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
mapper.select: SELECT case_number FROM register WHERE patient_id = #{patientId} ORDER BY id ASC LIMIT 1
